test_completeness.justification: BUG fix in the embedded terminal renderer. Every wiring behavior is unit- and/or E2E-tested; the sole untestable row is the actual GPU visual-smear clearing (requires a real GPU + monitor switch, not reproducible headless).

behaviors.behavior: window 'focus' -> safeFit + full-viewport term.refresh(0,rows-1) + dedupe-send WS resize
behaviors.evidence: unit useTerminalResize.test.ts 'window focus triggers refit + term.refresh + a resize frame' PASSED; E2E 91 scenario 1 PASSED
unit 'document visibilitychange (becoming visible) triggers refit + term.refresh' PASSED; E2E 91 scenario 2 PASSED
unit 'pageshow (bfcache restore) triggers refit + term.refresh' PASSED; E2E 91 scenario 3 PASSED
unit 'visibilitychange while document.hidden=true is a no-op' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: disposed terminal -> focus is a no-op (no fit/refresh on dead term)
behaviors.evidence: unit 'focus after disposed=true is a no-op' PASSED
unit 'removes the focus/visibility/pageshow listeners on unmount' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: unchanged dims -> repaint still fires but WS resize frame is deduped
behaviors.evidence: unit 'focus with unchanged dims still repaints but dedupes the resize frame' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: listeners re-attach after a route-navigation remount (Triage/Card/Inbox -> task)
behaviors.evidence: E2E 91 'listeners re-attach after route navigation' PASSED in real Chromium
unit xtermAddons.test.ts 'registers a WebGL onContextLoss handler that disposes the addon' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: the actual visual smear clears on a real GPU after a window/monitor refocus
behaviors.evidence: WebGL GPU-context-loss + per-monitor DPR switch cannot be reproduced in headless CI; real-device smoke = user

enumeration_basis.basis: one behavior row per code path introduced (3 events x repaint, 4 edge guards, remount re-attach, context-loss) + 1 device-only visual outcome

surface_verification.runner: BASE_URL=http://localhost:5273 playwright test e2e/flows/91-terminal-repaint-on-refocus.spec.ts --project=chromium (isolated stack: temp USERPROFILE, loopback, no Claude spawn)
